violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the sanitizer buckets and 3 bay sink basin have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
Steamer gaskets were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025
Pre-rinse spray hose at warewashing area observed in poor repair when in use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

Milk was observed in milk cooler between 44-46 degrees Fahrenheit. Temperature logs were reviewed. Milk that was out of temperature s placed into other refrigeration to blast chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

Milk cooler was observed at ranging ambient temperatures of 41-50 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Bottom half of unit was observed at 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Top half of unit was observed between 47-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

Blade of the can opener observed with peeled/chipped coating. Blade shall be repaired or replaced.-Establishment shall not use can opener until it is repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2023
